goal: Add a side-effect-free consume authority builder that records memory-cache audit export permit-consume authorization from ready consume preflight while keeping permit consume, file writes, durable persistence, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and external actions closed.
scope_out: Do not consume permits, write export files, persist durable state, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or perform external actions.
claims: Ready memory-cache audit export permit consume preflight can produce a side-effect-free consume authorization artifact.
Consume authority id, authorizer, and expiry refs are required.
Permit consume and file writes remain false.
assumptions: Actual permit consumption and export writing require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing authority id, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit consumption, file write, durable persistence, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-116 preflighted memory-cache audit export permit consume without consuming the permit.
